pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java source and target version to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the compiler source/target remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate dependency management from javax.inject to jakarta.inject-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject artifacts are deprecated/removed in newer JDKs and Jakarta EE ecosystems; code using javax.inject will fail to compile or link against Jakarta-based dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate dependency management from javax.annotation-api to jakarta.annotation-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation artifacts are deprecated/removed in newer JDKs and Jakarta EE ecosystems; code using javax.annotation will fail to compile or link against Jakarta-based dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update SLF4J version to 2.x to ensure compatibility with JDK 21 and modern logging frameworks.
pom.xml.why_exists: SLF4J 1.x may have runtime issues or incompatibilities with JDK 21 module system or newer logging backends.
